title: After the Kikuka Sho: What's the Right Way?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen claims victory at the Kikuka
Sho. Overwhelmed with happiness, tears of joy
run down her face.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing that, Mejiro Palmer questions whether or
not she herself has that kind of passion for
running.
